title: Skillmatics Poke-in Art - Magical Princesses, Mess-Free Fun for Kids, DIY Sewing Craft Kits, Creative Activity, Christmas Gifts for Girls & Boys Ages 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
features: POKE-IN ART ACTIVITY: This mess-free craft activity encourages creativity! Kids can create beautiful DIY princesses using fabric squares that are poked into foam to decorate their gowns. Then, they can craft their very own DIY wand and cast spells for all types of magical play!
INCLUDES: 700+ Fabric Squares, 6 Foam Princesses, 1 Magical Wand, 1 Foam Star, 6 Stands, 2 Poke-in Sticks, a Poke-in Pad, and an Instruction Manual.

MESS-FREE: Parents will love this no-mess art activity that doesn't require glue, cutting, painting, or colouring, ensuring a truly mess-free and enjoyable creative experience! The pad also protects surfaces.

EASY TO USE: Place a foam princess on the poke-in pad and decorate her gown with fabric squares using the poke-in stick. Repeat for all slots to complete your princess, then place her on the stand. Similarly, craft your magical wand by following the same steps with the foam star. Insert the wooden wand stick into the center hole.
DIY DECOR & PRETEND PLAY: Completed princesses can be used as charming decor to brighten up any room or for imaginative play, perfect for gifting family and friends!

DEVELOP KEY SKILLS: While having fun, children will develop essential skills like creative thinking, pincer grasp, hand-eye coordination, and visual perception. It's an engaging way for them to grow and learn!
HIGH-QUALITY: Made with premium materials to ensure durability and longevity, this set allows children to enjoy crafting and decorating princess gowns.
BEST GIFT EVER!: Skillmatics Poke-In Art Activity is the perfect gift for girls and boys ages 4 to 9 years who love princesses and all things magical.
ENCOURAGES INDEPENDENT PLAY: A perfect solo activity, helping kids boost their creativity and confidence, as they bring their creations to life!
